Who This Is For

something isn't adding up.

This is for the founder who is past the beginning but stuck before the next level. Working hard. Unclear on why the numbers aren't reflecting it.

The Framework

Three pillars.
Every gap lives in one of them.

Your report scores you across Clear, Worthy, and Wealthy — the three places where founder revenue gets stuck. Most women are strong in one, moderate in another, and losing significant money in the third. The assessment finds which one and tells you exactly what to do about it.

I

Clear

Positioning & Clarity

II

Worthy

Pricing & Self-Worth

III

Wealthy

Operations & Scale

About Anitta Hamming

She reads businesses
the way others read people.

Anitta Hamming is a business coach, consultant, and public speaker based in Ontario. She is the founder of Women Who Know, creator of the Clear/Worthy/Wealthy framework, and author of Waste of Head Space: From Nothing to Knowing.

She has spent years working with female founders stuck at exactly the plateau this assessment is designed to diagnose — smart women, working hard, unclear on why the revenue won't move.

  • Founder & President, Creative Nomad Studios
  • Creator, Clear / Worthy / Wealthy framework
  • Author, Waste of Head Space
  • Public speaker
  • Business coach & diagnostic consultant

What You Receive

A report written
specifically for you.

Not a template. Not a score with generic advice attached. Your answers are analysed against verified North American benchmark data for your industry. What comes back names the patterns in your business — including the ones you've been circling around but haven't said out loud.

01

Your Business Snapshot

A sharp read of what your answers reveal — the pattern beneath the surface problem, written for your specific situation.

02

How You Stack Up

Your revenue, pricing, team structure, and client acquisition compared against verified North American benchmarks for your specific industry. Numbers, not opinions.

03

Your Top Gaps

The 1–4 most significant gaps in your business, each named precisely with three concrete steps to close each one.

04

Clear, Worthy, Wealthy Score

A scored breakdown across all three pillars with specific action steps grounded in what you actually answered — not generic advice.

05

The Path Forward

A direct read on what moves your business next — including what your answers reveal about why you haven't moved it yet.

How It Works

Honest answers.
Honest report.

This is not a 90-minute survey. The questions are short, direct, and uncomfortable in exactly the right way. Your first instinct is the correct answer — resist the urge to make it sound better than it is. The quality of your report is directly proportional to how honest you are.

1

Secure your spot

Your card is held — not charged — when you begin. You're charged $57 only when your personalised report is ready.

2

Answer 18 questions

Most founders complete this in 12–18 minutes. Short questions, honest answers. The more specific you are, the more useful your report becomes.

3

Receive your report

Within one business day, your personalised diagnostic arrives by email. Not generic tips — a report written specifically for your business and your answers.

4

Decide what's next

Some founders read the report and start implementing immediately. Others realise they need someone in the room. The report will tell you which type you are.

Ready to see what the numbers actually say about your business?

Common Questions

Things founders ask
before they begin.

Is this just a quiz with generic results?

No. Your answers are analysed against data specific to your industry and used to generate a report written for your situation. Two founders in the same industry with different answers receive fundamentally different reports.

I think I already know what my problems are. Will this tell me anything new?

Possibly not. But most founders who say this discover the report names the problem beneath the problem — the reason the known issue hasn't been fixed. If you already know and have already fixed it, this isn't for you. If you know and haven't fixed it, that gap is worth $57 to examine.

Why does it take one business day?

Because every report is personal. The results are individual to you, to your answers, to your specific situation — this is not a generic output. What arrives in your inbox will contain action steps you can start using the moment you read it. That takes a little time to do properly.

What if I'm not happy with the report?

30-day money-back guarantee, no conditions. If you receive your report and are not satisfied for any reason, email us within 30 days and we'll refund you in full. No forms, no questions.
